message:
feat(core): Enhance encryption, indexer streaming, and data model types

Major improvements to core infrastructure modules:

src/encryption.rs:
- Added AES-256-GCM encryption utilities for HTML export
- Implemented PBKDF2 and Argon2 key derivation
- Added HKDF expansion for derived keys
- Web Crypto API compatible output format
- Zeroizing for sensitive key material
- Added comprehensive test coverage for crypto primitives

src/indexer/mod.rs:
- Enhanced streaming indexing pipeline (Opt 8.2)
- Improved backpressure handling in producer-consumer channels
- Better progress reporting during incremental scans
- Added schema version detection for breaking changes
- Improved merge cooldown logic for Tantivy segments

src/lib.rs:
- Updated CLI command definitions
- Added new subcommands for model management
- Enhanced robot-format output options
- Improved error code documentation

src/model/types.rs:
- Added ConversationMetadata for richer session info
- Enhanced Message type with snippet associations
- Added role normalization utilities
- Improved timestamp handling across agents
- Added serialization helpers for export formats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
